case_title: REGINA ERCOLANI VS. JUAN CARLOS BENITEZ *REL: FL042382

docket_entries.description: APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, #5797. OR WITHOUT COUNSEL. ALL TEMPORARY ORDER REMAIN IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT. PET TO PREPARE REISSUANCE. PROCEEDINGS
(403/CWW) NICOLA WOOD WITH PET; RESP IN PRO PER. RESP REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE TO OBTAIN COUNSEL AND AN INTERPRETER. CONT. TO 9/24/01 AT 9A. RESP ADVISED MATTER WILL
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING (CLETS) - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CONTINUED (FR9/12/01), CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR SEP-24-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 403
(403/CWW) NICOLE WOOD WITH PET; N/A RESP AT 9:42A. PROOF OF SERVICE IN ORDER. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT ORDERS A STANDARD CONDUCT RESTRAINING ORDER AGAINST RESP
WITH 100 YARD STAY AWAY, INCLUDING CHILD ELISIAH, SCHOOL, DAY CARE, AND. 1040 GEARY ST., SF. RESP ORDERED TO SURRENDER ANY FIREARMS IN HIS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-DOMESTIC VIOLENCE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 403
APPLICATION & ORDER FOR REISSUANCE OF OSC, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR SEP-24-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 403
PROCEED AT THE NEXT CALLING WITH OR WITHOUT COUNSEL. ALL TEMPORARY ORDER REMAIN IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT. PET TO PREPARE REISSUANCE. PROCEEDINGS
